title: Translate from English to Slovenian and back to English between 2 columns
excerpt: Add the Slovenian language to the AI translation. I would like to translate from English to Slovenian and Slovenian to English. I am in the USA and work with hundreds of people from Slovenia.

posts.author: PMO12 (Liam Murtagh)
